title: Agent Systems
subtitle: Autonomous AI Agents on Base
description: Design, deploy, and manage autonomous AI agents with on-chain identity, token-gated access, and multi-agent coordination. Build for Virtuals Protocol and beyond.

lessons.title: Agent Architecture
lessons.description: Core components of autonomous agents — perception, reasoning, action loops.
lessons.topics: Agent loops, LLM integration, Tool use, Memory systems

lessons.title: On-Chain Identity for Agents
lessons.description: Giving agents wallets, signing capabilities, and on-chain reputation.
lessons.topics: Agent wallets, Delegated signing, On-chain attestations, Reputation tracking

lessons.title: Token-Gated Agent Access
lessons.description: Restricting agent actions and data access based on token holdings.
lessons.topics: Token gating, $SCOM staking, Access tiers, Balance verification

lessons.title: Multi-Agent Coordination
lessons.description: Patterns for multiple agents working together — routing, delegation, consensus.
lessons.topics: Agent routing, Task delegation, Consensus mechanisms, Conflict resolution

lessons.title: Virtuals Protocol Deep Dive
lessons.description: Building and deploying agents on the Virtuals Protocol platform.
lessons.topics: Virtuals framework, Agent deployment, Revenue models, Agent evaluation

lessons.title: Production Operations
lessons.description: Monitoring, logging, alerting, and upgrading agents in production.
lessons.topics: Agent monitoring, Error recovery, Version management, Cost optimization
